correct_code:
def flip_string(text):
    out = ''
    idx = len(text) - 1
    while idx >= 0:
        out += text[idx]
        idx -= 1
    return out
buggy_code:
def flip_string(text):
    out = ''
    idx = len(text) - 1
    while idx >= 0:
        out += text[idx]
        idx -= 1
    return None
test_code:
assert flip_string('world') == 'dlrow'
assert flip_string('x') == 'x'
assert flip_string('ab') == 'ba'
